item.title: SEC plans July release of "Regulation Crypto" proposal offering safe harbors from securities registration for crypto asset issuers
US Senate CLARITY Act vote approaches with seven Democratic votes still outstanding; Galaxy Digital puts passage odds at 50%
EU MiCA fully in force as of July 1; roughly 230 firms hold valid EU crypto licenses as transitional arrangements expire
UK Financial Conduct Authority publishes final crypto framework covering trading, custody, and market abuse rules
JPMorgan to allow institutional clients to pledge Bitcoin and Ether as loan collateral, potentially unlocking $20B in liquidity
Coinbase receives UK FCA authorization to offer equities and perpetual futures to retail and institutional clients
GENIUS Act stablecoin rulemaking begins July 18; issuers above $10B face 360-day transition to federal oversight
Vanguard opens search for head of digital assets to oversee tokenization, stablecoin, custody, and blockchain strategy
US Bancorp studying stablecoin issuance as institutional crypto custody arm revives under post-GENIUS Act environment
Kraken applies for full banking license in Lithuania to expand institutional services across Europe
Australia Travel Rule takes effect July 1 with no minimum threshold; all virtual asset transfers now require identity-linked data
Supreme Court ruling creates channel for expanded White House influence over SEC and CFTC crypto oversight
Security researchers disclose and patch Aptos blockchain flaw that could have exposed $70B in digital assets to systemic attack
JPMorgan warns rushed CLARITY Act provisions risk creating regulatory gaps at the SEC-CFTC jurisdiction boundary
